name: Orange-And-Ginger Butternut Squash Puree
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Butternut squash, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the cubed squash in a medium saucepan and cover with cold water.
2. Place over medium-high heat and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Drain well.
5. Transfer the squash to a food processor.
6. Add the ginger and orange zest and process until smooth.
7. Add salt and pepper to taste.
8. Divide among 4 plates and serve.
